title: impatiens cuspidata var. bipartita

preparations: Impatiens cuspidata var. bipartita has many herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used for medicinal purposes. side_effects: Impatiens cuspidata var. bipartita can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, or digestive issues in some individuals.
